regime_fall.current_status: Iran's regime faces escalating military pressure with U.S. and Israeli forces conducting sustained operations, including downing of U.S. aircraft, while simultaneous diplomatic engagement through regional mediators offers a narrow window for negotiation amid severe economic collapse and hardliner consolidation of power.
regime_fall.last_major_event: U.S. F-15 fighter jet shot down by Iran's IRGC Aerospace Force on April 4 with one crew member rescued and one missing, marking direct air-to-air combat loss during ongoing ceasefire negotiations.
